hook.summary: Fast-paced slot machine gameplay with rapidly increasing coin counts and fire effects.
hook.visual_action: The slot machine reels spin quickly, landing on winning combinations of fruits and bells while a coin counter at the bottom surges.

scene_flow: Continuous slot machine gameplay showing '777 FLAMING' theme and 'Free Games' progression.
Rapidly accumulating coin counter at the bottom of the screen synchronized with reel spins.
Transition to a spinning 3D diamond asset on a golden pedestal.
Final branding screen with 'Spin the world with Jackpot World' and a 'Play Now' button.
on_screen_text: SPIN THE WORLD WITH JACKPOT WORLD
audience_proxy: Casual casino game enthusiasts who are motivated by high-frequency rewards and classic slot aesthetics.
